---
title: "Research"
format: html
toc: true
---

## Publications

[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=BvIDsDMAAAAJ&hl=en)

[ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-9728-4198)

## Research Interests

- **Vascular Biology**
  - Vascular Tissue Engineering
  - Endothelial Cell Mechanobiology
- **Sports Performance Measurement and Analytics**
  - Running Physiology
  - Wearable Sensor design
  - [Sports Data Analysis and Visualization](research_interests/sports_data_visualization.qmd)
- **Biomedical Data Science Education for Low-Resource Settings**
  - Low-Cost and Accessible Biomedical Data Science Curricula
  - Infrastructure-Light Training Platforms for Biomedical Data Science
